title: Smoky Chicken Kebabs
description: A flavorful and spicy chicken kebab recipe, perfect for a quick and easy dinner. Simply marinate the chicken in a blend of Egyptian spices and grill to perfection.

ingredients.name: Smoky Egyptian spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most Middle Eastern grocery stores

instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together smoky Egyptian spice blend, light olive oil, lime juice, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice blend.
Thread the chicken breast and onion mixture onto skewers.
Brush the grill with a little bit of light olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the kebabs for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the chicken is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
